title: The Rise and Fall of the Brown Buffalo
original_title: The Rise and Fall of the Brown Buffalo
overview: Film uncovers the true story behind legendary Chicano activist Oscar Zeta Acosta, the real-life inspiration for Hunter S. Thompson's "Dr. Gonzo"
